1822190.name: Momotype
1822190.description:
The monotype, an off-shoot virtual pet, is being play-tested by members of your company. You have been selected.

An experimental, retro take on tamogotchi-lite games. Will you fulfill Momo's needs or does he need something greater?



Features

Original art.
Approximately 10,000+ words.
30-40 min for each playthrough.
Ambient/ lo-fi soundtrack.
3 separate endings and one secret ending.

IMPORTANT: Mainline narrative progresses with each play-through


Rimatoad: Writer, Programmer, Artist, Musician, and UI

Glazed Goose: Programmer and UI

Twitter GitHub

​Amaranthine: Musician, Track: Ebb and Flood

Twitter ​ Website
​
Thanks to Rose for the music track, "Weekly Fair"!

日本語化パッチ


Note: Momotype changes with each play-through. The "reset" button reverts the play-through counter to zero, and the play-through proceeding this action will not reflect any new changes .
